Notes: UWO ranked 23rd in NCAA Div. III by D3hoops.com...UWO's first contest since
Jan. 5...UWO got 19 points and 7 rebounds from Porath...UWP got 22 points and
9 rebounds from Domask...UWO shot 61.5 percent (16-26) from field in second
half...UWO trailed 27-12 with 5:28 left in the second quarter.
Game.Officials: Austin Edge,  Steve Matuszewski,  Matt Vanevenhoven
